ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the team was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the team's information was last updated */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* The URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match (e.g., home, away) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "xG_scored" REAL /* Expected goals scored by the team */,
  "xG_conceded" REAL /* Expected goals conceded by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Actual goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Actual goals conceded by the team */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators attending the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* The status of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the opponent team is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the opponent team was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the opponent team's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_opponents" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "opponent_side" TEXT /* The side of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the stadium */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the stadium was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the stadium's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stadiums" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "field_condition" TEXT /* The condition of the field during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* The full name of the referee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the referee was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the referee's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "match_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* The type of event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* The time of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the match event was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the match event's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* The type of statistic */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* The value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the match statistic was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the match statistic's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
